title: batatas ternata
intro: Batatas ternata, also known as the Ternate yam, is a type of plant species belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family, native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Batatas ternata include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Batatas ternata include dried roots, which can be made into teas or infusions, as well as extracts that can be used in capsules or tinctures.
